exampleSurfaces: Shared MockupPreviews gallery remains consumed by examples/basic-usage with identical controls and surfaces as Storybook
notes: Performed iterative fidelity pass on all nine mock families, tightening casing/tabs/page chrome, typography scale, section rhythm, and layout geometry to closely match project preview references.
Added page-family-specific structures: dark ad-sheet slot compositions, tri-pane atelier chat, dashboard hero+KPI+ledger+gauge side panel, and encyclopedia running-head with TOC/article/marginalia.
Kept story controls and shared surface architecture stable while increasing visual match quality in shared source files only.
Validation completed during implementation pass: npm run lint, npm run build-storybook, and examples/basic-usage npm run build passed.
runtimeCallPaths: project/preview/*.html -> fidelity reference for visual reconstruction
